about:
I am an Informatics student at Universitas Singaperbangsa Karawang with a GPA of 3.90. I have a strong passion for software development, programming, and UI/UX design.



Since 2023, I have been actively working as an IT freelancer, contributing to various projects ranging from application development to digital solutions. In addition to my professional experience, I am actively involved in HIMTIKA and BEM Fasilkom Academy as part of my personal and professional development beyond academics. My goal is to continuously grow in the technology industry, master various programming stacks, and make meaningful contributions through internship opportunities at innovative companies. I believe that the combination of technical expertise and strong teamwork is the key to creating impactful digital product.
